reviews.comment:
Es una Eess Aca,  no hay mucho para agregar. Atención muy bien, están remodelando los baños de hombre ( julio 2023), en el shop se puede comer bien a la carta

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station here, there's not much to add. The service is very good, they're remodeling the men's restrooms (July 2023), and you can eat well à la carte in the shop.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) When we passed by there, they no longer sold gasoline to foreigners. It was only available at the neighboring gas station, on the other side of the highway.

(Original)
Quando passamos por aí, já não vendia gasolina para estrangeiros. Só havia no posto do vizinho, outro lado da rodovia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKaGF6N1pnEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, restaurante con pocas ofertas, no existen variedades de productos como por ejemplo el yogurt.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, restaurant with few options, no variety of products such as yogurt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKbWZERWxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) You know those gas stations with a "scheme"? Well, this is one of them. The problem is the poor service from the attendants, as well as the policy of not refueling vehicles that don't have Argentinian license plates. It's like I'm in Brazil, specifically Rio de Janeiro, where everyone makes their own rules to favor others. In short, to Brazilians, I recommend refueling in other cities.

(Original)
Sabe aquele posto com "esquema", então esse é um deles. Atendimento ruim dos frentistas é o problema, assim como a política de não abastecer veículos que não são de placa argentina.  Parece até que estou no Brasil e no Rio de Janeiro,  onde cada um faz a sua regra para favorecer outras pessoas.  Enfim, aos Brasileiros,  recomendo abastecer em outras cidades.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4bTZUMjlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para pasar la noche. Personal amable. Tiene habitaciones para alquilar. Baño sin duchas.
Para cargar nafta se aceptan todos los medios de pago

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to spend the night. Friendly staff. Rooms available. Bathrooms without showers.
All payment methods accepted for fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4a2RPcjVnRRAB
